# EHS Simplified
> Safety solutions for small trade and manufacturing businesses. Mobile app + CSP expertise, starting at $99/month.

EHS Simplified is a mobile safety platform built specifically for small businesses (5–50 employees) in trades, manufacturing, construction, hospitality, retail/warehousing, and cannabis. It provides OSHA-aligned safety tools that are typically out of reach for small businesses — at a fraction of the cost of enterprise platforms or traditional consulting.

## Pages
- Homepage: https://www.ehssimplified.com/
- Plans & Pricing: https://www.ehssimplified.com/plans.html
- Industries We Serve: https://www.ehssimplified.com/industries.html
- Client Testimonials: https://www.ehssimplified.com/testimonials.html
- Safety Resources & Blog: https://www.ehssimplified.com/blog.html
- About Aaron Leff, CSP: https://www.ehssimplified.com/about.html

## What EHS Simplified Does
- Mobile app for workplace safety management (iOS and Android)
- OSHA-aligned inspection checklists and hazard reporting
- SDS (Safety Data Sheet) library for chemical safety
- Preloaded safety training videos
- Secure company document portal
- Emergency contacts and response plans
- CSP (Certified Safety Professional) expertise behind every subscription

## Who It's For
Small businesses of 5–50 employees in:
- Construction & trades (roofing, framing, general contracting)
- Manufacturing and metal fabrication
- HVAC, plumbing, and electrical contractors
- Hospitality and food service
- Retail and warehousing
- Cannabis cultivation and processing

## Pricing
- Safety Starter: $99/month — full app access, self-managed
- Safety Foundation: $199/month — done-for-you setup, monthly CSP check-in
- Safety Partner: $349/month — 2 hrs/month CSP consulting
- Safety Management: $699/month — 4 hrs/month CSP consulting, custom policies and training

All plans are 12-month agreements. Annual prepay available.

## About the Founder
Aaron Leff, CSP — 25+ years of Environmental Health & Safety experience. Certified Safety Professional. Based in Strafford, NH.
